acceptanceCriteria.text: LinkStudentWithGuardianUseCase validates relationship via DB lookup
Existing student-side linking endpoints still work with UUID relationship IDs

snapshot.description: Remove hardcoded GuardianRelationshipType enum from DTOs, remove Guardian.validateRelationshipId() and Guardian.getGuardianType() static methods. Update LinkStudentWithGuardianUseCase to validate relationship type via DB existence check. Update link-student-guardian.request.ts to accept IsUUID instead of IsEnum.
snapshot.title: Remove Hardcoded Enum and Update Student-Side Linking
